page_metadata.biotools__summary: FLEX (Functional evaluation of experimental perturbations) is an R package and a pipeline that utilizes several functional annotation resources to establish reference standards for systematic evaluation of genome-wide CRISPR screens.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: FLEX (Functional evaluation of experimental perturbations) is an R package and a pipeline that utilizes several functional annotation resources to establish reference standards for systematic evaluation of genome-wide CRISPR screens.
